title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Backend Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
